system_logs.detail:
INSERT INTO auth_users
            (username,password_hash,password_hint,employee_id,display_name,email,role_code,is_active,force_password_change,last_login_at,note,created_at,updated_at)
            VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
            ON CONFLICT(username) DO UPDATE SET
                password_hash=excluded.password_hash,
                employee_id=excluded.employee_id,
                display_name=excluded.display_name,
                email=excluded.email,
                role_code=excluded.role_code,
                is_active=excluded.is_active,
                force_password_change=excluded.force_password_change,
                last_login_at=excluded.last_login_at,
                note=excluded.note,
                updated_at=excluded.updated_at

system_logs.message: INSERT auth_users
system_logs.detail:
INSERT INTO auth_users
            (username,password_hash,password_hint,employee_id,display_name,email,role_code,is_active,force_password_change,last_login_at,note,created_at,updated_at)
            VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
            ON CONFLICT(username) DO UPDATE SET
                password_hash=excluded.password_hash,
                employee_id=excluded.employee_id,
                display_name=excluded.display_name,
                email=excluded.email,
                role_code=excluded.role_code,
                is_active=excluded.is_active,
                force_password_change=excluded.force_password_change,
                last_login_at=excluded.last_login_at,
                note=excluded.note,
                updated_at=excluded.updated_at

            (username,password_hash,password_hint,employee_id,display_name,email,role_code,is_active,force_password_change,last_login_at,note,created_at,updated_at)

                password_hash=excluded.password_hash,
                employee_id=excluded.employee_id,
                display_name=excluded.display_name,
                email=excluded.email,
                role_code=excluded.role_code,
                is_active=excluded.is_active,

                note=excluded.note,

system_logs.message: INSERT process_options
system_logs.detail:
transaction=V88_SYNC_13_SYSTEM_SETTINGS_CACHE; 
                INSERT INTO process_options(process_name, is_active, sort_order, note, created_at, updated_at)
                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                ON CONFLICT(process_name) DO UPDATE SET
                    is_active=excluded.is_active,
                    sort_order=excluded.sort_order,
                    note=excluded.note,
                    updated_at=excluded.updated_at

                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                ON CONFLICT(category_name, process_name) DO UPDATE SET
                    is_active=excluded.is_active,
                    sort_order=excluded.sort_order,
                    note=excluded.note,
                    updated_at=excluded.updated_at

            (username,password_hash,password_hint,employee_id,display_name,email,role_code,is_active,force_password_change,last_login_at,note,created_at,updated_at)
